JobDescription: Support treaty/facultative placement analysis and reinsurance reporting for insurance portfolios.
Design and optimize short-term products with underwriting and distribution teams.
Develop ML models using telematics and policy data for pricing risk selection and fraud prevention.
Lead motor pricing analytics elasticity testing and portfolio optimization.
Build machine-learning features for quote conversion churn and claims risk scoring.
Maintain and improve automated underwriting rules and referral logic.
Underwrite complex commercial risks and negotiate policy terms with brokers.
Deliver actuarial insights for reserve adequacy pricing actions and portfolio health.
Support pricing optimization and performance analytics across short-term brands.
Implement ML/AI solutions for underwriting automation and claims decision support.
General careers entry for insurance roles including pricing, underwriting, actuarial, reinsurance, product, and AI/ML where available.
